name: Vigo
description_short: Western Union agent network offering money transfers, cash pickup, bill payments, and check cashing services through partner locations across the U.S.
description_long:
Western Union is a global money transfer service that operates through an extensive network of agent locations in the United States. The company has been a leader in international and domestic money movement for decades, leveraging partnerships with local businesses to provide accessible financial services in communities nationwide.

The platform offers a comprehensive suite of services including sending money domestically and internationally, picking up cash transfers, tracking transfers in real-time, paying bills online, mobile top-up services, and receiving money on prepaid cards. Through their agent network, customers can also access check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment options at participating locations. The website displays a location finder showing agent partners (grocery stores, markets, check cashing shops) with operating hours and phone numbers.

What distinguishes Western Union is its massive global reach and agent network density—the sample results show 46+ locations in Colorado alone with varying hours to serve different customer schedules. The platform offers multilingual support (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) and a loyalty rewards program. Their prepaid card option and inmate payment service address niche customer needs not commonly available through traditional banking.

A significant caveat is that Western Union transactions typically carry transaction fees that vary by transfer type, amount, and destination. The service relies on third-party agents rather than company-owned locations, meaning service quality and hours vary by partner. Customers must visit physical locations for many services, limiting convenience compared to digital-first competitors. The company's historical association with fraud risks requires customers to exercise caution when sending money.
pros: Extensive agent network with 46+ locations shown in sample Colorado search, providing wide geographic accessibility
Multilingual platform support in 6 languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Multiple service channels including online transfers, mobile app, in-person agent locations, and phone support
Western Union Rewards loyalty program offering benefits on repeated transactions
Real-time transfer tracking allows customers to monitor money movement status
Flexible receiving options including cash pickup, prepaid card deposits, and bank account transfers
Extended service hours at partner locations with early morning (8 AM) and late morning openings
cons: Transaction fees apply to most services and can be substantial depending on transfer amount and destination
Service quality and availability depends on third-party agent partners rather than company-controlled locations
Requires physical location visit for check cashing, money orders, and cash pickup services
Historical association with fraud and scam activity may deter security-conscious consumers
Limited direct ownership and control over customer experience compared to bank-based alternatives
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending money to family members internationally or domestically
Unbanked and underbanked populations without access to traditional banking services
Individuals needing quick cash access without a bank account or checking services
Customers in rural or underserved areas where agent partners provide the only accessible financial service
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers, immigrants, and individuals in underserved areas needing cash access, money transfers, or bill payment without a bank account. The primary caveat is that transaction fees can be high, and service quality varies by agent partner location—customers must physically visit locations for many services, limiting convenience for those seeking digital alternatives.
services: Domestic money transfers within the United States
International money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
Western Union Prepaid card account services
Receive money on prepaid card option

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 907 N 16th St, Phoenix, AZ 85006, USA
